basic_details.job_title: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Project Associate - I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Project Associate - II: Maximum age limit is 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree (B.E./B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent
qualification.details: Project Associate - I: Bachelor's degree (B.E./B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent. Desirable experience: specialization in Water Resources, Hydraulic, Coastal Engineering, or GIS & Remote Sensing. Project Associate - II: Bachelor's Degree (B.E./B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent and 2 years experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions OR Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services OR Master's in Civil Engineering/ Chemical Engineering / Mechanical Engineering from a recognized university.

salary_details.details: Project Associate - I: Rs. 31000 + 20% HRA (for those who have qualified national eligibility tests or GATE, or equivalent) OR Rs. 25000 + HRA (for those who do not fall under the previous condition). Project Associate - II: Rs. 35,000 + HRA (for those who have qualified national eligibility tests or GATE, or equivalent) OR Rs. 28000 + HRA (for those who do not fall under the previous condition).

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate positions at CSIR CSMCRI?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 24-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Associate positions, with one each for Project Associate - I and Project Associate - II.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: For Project Associate - I, candidates need a Bachelor's degree (B.E./B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Project Associate - I and Project Associate - II positions is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Associate - I is Rs. 31000+ 20% HRA for those who have qualified national eligibility tests or GATE, or Rs. 25000+HRA for others.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Project Associate - II?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Associate - II is Rs. 35,000 + HRA for those who have qualified national eligibility tests or GATE, or Rs. 28000+HRA for others.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: While a Bachelor's degree is the minimum qualification, desirable experience in specific areas like Water Resources, Coastal Engineering, or GIS is preferred for Project Associate - I.

faq.question: Q9. What is the experience requirement for Project Associate - II?
faq.answer: For Project Associate - II, candidates need 2 years of experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for CSIR CSMCRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
